PROFILE
Dynamic sales professional with 6 years B2B sales experience in UAE. Proven track record exceeding targets in IT solutions and enterprise software. Strong relationship builder with GCC client base.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Sales Executive | TechBridge Solutions | Dubai | 2020 – Present
• Exceeded annual sales targets by 120% consistently for 3 years
• Managed portfolio of 45 enterprise clients across UAE and Saudi Arabia
• Closed AED 12M in new business revenue in 2023
• Led product demonstrations and proposal presentations for C-suite audiences
• Developed strategic partnerships with 3 major system integrators

Account Manager | DigitalFirst Corp | Abu Dhabi | 2018 – 2020
• Onboarded 20+ new accounts in first year
• Maintained 95% client retention rate
• Coordinated with delivery teams on implementation timelines
